name: Elegan Grey
signature: A hairline double-rule that draws itself beneath every section label, framed by open corner-bracket marks on the cover names and bridal portraits — like a wax-sealed, formally engraved invitation.
brief: Monochrome, gallery-quiet, and formal. For couples who want the gravity of an engraved invitation rather than a botanical or playful theme. Hairline rules, corner brackets, a numbered Susunan Acara timeline, and a floating quick-nav with auto-scroll.
